scenarios.name: pricing_during_name_collection

history.content: And could I get your first and last name for the booking?
Oh wait — how much does it cost?

scenarios.expected_behavior: Speak one filler phrase from the TOOL-CALL FILLER set, then call universal_router intent="info_pivot". Do NOT say "Our team handles billing directly". Do NOT call callback_request or wrap_up. Do NOT ask for the caller's name first.
